$description: Component tokens for Mobile Avatar — a circular or rounded-square user representation component. Displays either a photo, initials text, or a placeholder icon. Supports 6 sizes, 2 shape variants (rounded pill vs square), 2 states (Default, Hover), and optional sub-components: online indicator, company indicator, action icon, and loader. Sub-component tokens are defined in their own files: avatar-mask.json, avatar-action-icon.json, avatar-online-indicator.json, avatar-company-indicator.json. Figma Reference: Node ID 367-5165

$component.name: Avatar
$component.description: A mobile avatar component that represents a user or entity. Renders as a circle (rounded=True) or rounded square (rounded=False). Content can be a photo (placeholder=False), initials text (text=True), or a placeholder icon. On hover (state=Hover), an action icon can appear centered on the avatar (with an optional mask overlay behind it). Status badges (online indicator dot or company logo) can appear at the bottom-right.
$component.structure: Single container (circle or rounded-square) with: optional photo image filling the container, optional initials text centered, optional Avatar Mask overlay on hover, optional Avatar Action Icon in top-right on hover, optional status badge (online/company) at bottom-right.

rounded.true: Fully circular pill (rounded-[200px]) — the standard avatar shape
rounded.false: Rounded square (8px border-radius) — for grid/list layouts

state.default: Static avatar — photo or initials only, no overlay
state.hover: Interactive state — Avatar Mask overlay appears, Action Icon renders on top

statusIcon.online: Avatar Online Indicator (green dot) at bottom-right — see avatar-online-indicator.json
statusIcon.company: Avatar Company Indicator (company logo badge) at bottom-right — see avatar-company-indicator.json

placeholder.false: Has a photo — image fills the circular container
placeholder.true: No photo — shows initials or placeholder icon on gray/100 background

subComponents.avatarMask: avatar-mask.json — hover overlay that dims photo

usage.contexts: User profile displays, contact lists, chat interfaces, comment threads, team member cards, navigation user menus
usage.features: 6 sizes, circular and rounded-square shapes, photo or initials content, hover action icon, online/company status badges, loader state

container.$comment: Avatar container — always square dimensions, shape determined by border-radius variant

xs.description: Mobile avatar container size for xs - 24px

sm.description: Mobile avatar container size for sm - 32px

md.description: Mobile avatar container size for md - 40px

lg.description: Mobile avatar container size for lg - 48px

xl.description: Mobile avatar container size for xl - 56px

rounded.description: Mobile avatar container border radius for rounded=True - fully circular pill (rendered via rounded-[200px] in Figma — effectively 50%)

xs.description: Mobile avatar container border radius for rounded=False - 4px (rounded square for grid/list contexts)

sm.description: Mobile avatar container border radius for rounded=False - 6px (rounded square for grid/list contexts)

md.description: Mobile avatar container border radius for rounded=False - 8px (rounded square for grid/list contexts)

lg.description: Mobile avatar container border radius for rounded=False - 8px (rounded square for grid/list contexts)

xl.description: Mobile avatar container border radius for rounded=False - 8px (rounded square for grid/list contexts)

2xl.description: Mobile avatar container border radius for rounded=False - 8px (rounded square for grid/list contexts)

color.description: Mobile avatar container background color - gray/100 - #f2f4f7 (used when displaying initials or placeholder; hidden when a photo fills the container)

text.$comment: Initials text displayed when placeholder=False and text=True. Typography scales with avatar size — xl documented here as reference.

color.description: Mobile avatar initials text color - gray/600 - #475467 (consistent across all sizes and states)

typography.$comment: Typography at xl size (56px container). Scales proportionally at other sizes.

xl.description: Mobile avatar initials text typography at xl size - 20px Regular, 30px line-height (font/size/4xl, font/weight/regular, font/line-height/4xl). Scales with avatar size.
